seo.description: Compare 240+ verified packers and movers in Guwahati. Instant quotes starting ₹4,000. Dispur, Paltan Bazaar, Chandmari, VIP Road covered. Live GPS tracking.

hero.title: Packers & Movers in Guwahati
hero.subtitle: Dispur to VIP Road, Paltan Bazaar to Chandmari — 240+ verified movers in the Gateway of Northeast.

intro: Guwahati is the gateway to Northeast India. Radhe packers and movers's 240+ verified vendors cover the entire metropolitan area — from the old commercial Paltan Bazaar to the government hub of Dispur and growing VIP Road corridor.
whyUs: Guwahati's Brahmaputra-side geography and Assam's monsoons require experience with flood-prone routes and waterproof packing. Our vendors are prepared for all weather conditions.

faqs.q: Do you cover areas beyond Guwahati within Assam?
faqs.a: Yes — moves to Jorhat, Tezpur, Silchar, Dibrugarh and other Assam cities are available.

faqs.q: What is the local move cost in Guwahati?
Do you use waterproof packing during monsoons?
faqs.a: Yes — all Northeast vendors use weather-resistant packing as standard.
